name: Valvulótomos venosos
curation_log: DRAFT generated by the LLM strawman (design §3 step 5) from real corpus samples — cheap and disposable, never authoritative. Requires the full M1 procedure (mining passes, price-discrimination test, expert curation, reference validation) before launch.
Dry run on 50 corpus samples: coverage {'diametro': 0.54, 'tipo': 0.08}, illegal extractions 0.
Fix-D part2: numeric domains regenerated — canonicalized to one unit, leading zeros normalized, corpus-observed values (>=25) added.

attribute_defs.name: diametro
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Diametro de la oliva/cabezal del valvulotomo; unico atributo que discrimina identidad entre productos de la categoria (2.0/2.5/3.0/3.5 mm); rango estandar observado.

attribute_defs.name: tipo
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Tipo constructivo del valvulotomo (guia in situ para by-pass vs. autoexpandible para protesis vasculares); distingue productos clinicamente distintos.
